name: Road Racer 2
description: Experience the thrill of the neon highway in Road Racer 2! Drive at high speeds, dodge heavy traffic, and survive the realistic day-night cycle with dynamic street lighting. Features smooth physics-based steering, stunning visual effects, and intense endless gameplay. How far can you go without crashing?
instructions: Desktop Use Left and Right Arrow keys to steer Mobile Tap the Left or Right side of the screen to move
